name: Silky Veal Chops (Mf)
recipeIngredient: 2 loin veal chops, approximately 1 1/2 inches thick
2 ounces Swiss or Gruyere cheese, grated
salt and freshly grated black pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, combine the boursin, mustard, and heavy cream. Season with salt and pepper.
2. Melt butter in a heavy skillet over medium heat. Add veal chops to brown for 4 minutes on each side. Remove and discard any excess fat from the skillet. Lower the heat, cover tightly, and braise for about 5 minutes per side or until just done. Transfer chops to a broiler pan.
3. Pour 1/4 cup of white wine into the skillet and scrape the bottom and corners with a wooden spatula to lift up any browned bits. Reduce the sauce until only 2 tablespoons remain.
4. Add the mustard, boursin, and cream mixture to the skillet. Mix gently until the boursin just melts into the cream. Remove the skillet from heat and stir in grated Swiss cheese.
5. Pour the sauce over the veal chops and broil for a moment or until the sauce browns and bubbles slightly, about 2 inches away from the heat.
Yield: 2 servings
